name: Sausages Mediterranean Style
recipeIngredient: 400 g Thomas Walls Pork Sausages; cut into large pieces (1 pack)
1 red pepper; seeded and cut into strips
1 227 gram can red kidney beans; drained and rinsed (7 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pan.
2. Add the garlic and sausage pieces, cook until browned.
3. Add pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add ratatouille, kidney beans, chopped tomatoes, pesto, sundried tomatoes, ketchup, and seasoning.
5. Simmer, uncovered, for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in olives prior to serving and garnish with the shredded basil.
7. Serve with tagliatelle or crusty bread and salad.
